name: pi-bio-workbench
description: Application workbench built on pi-bio-agent primitives; clinical genomics is the first binding.

scripts.test: rm -rf dist-test && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test dist-test/test/*.test.js
scripts.check: npm run check:manifest && npm run typecheck && npm test
scripts.demo:clinical: npm run build && node dist/cli.js run
